description_long: This object is a cylindrical container with a flat top and bottom, featuring a predominantly white body and a red-orange lid. The top surface displays bold text in white and yellow, including the phrases 'CHEESE GRILLE' and 'IT IS NOT A SANDWICH', along with smaller details such as 'SPICY TOMATO SOUP' and a phone number. Around the side, there is a large yellow label with a detailed recipe for spicy tomato soup, written in red and black text. The container appears to be made of a lightweight plastic material, typical for lotion or cream packaging, and is likely sealed with a snap-on or screw-on cap. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on text and branding rather than decorative graphics.
description: A white cylindrical container with a red-orange lid, featuring bold branding and a large recipe label on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow recipe label and the top branding clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with the red-orange lid and partial view of the recipe label.
description_view_2: Back view showing mostly the plain white body and the top branding text.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the recipe label and the top branding.
